title: Tick Control in Englewood, NJ | $125 - $325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Englewood, NJ starting at $125. Protect your family and pets from Lyme disease. Licensed experts serving Bergen County. Call today!
intro: Englewood, New Jersey residents face increasing tick populations due to the area's proximity to wooded parks and the Palisades. Our professional tick control services protect your family, pets, and property from dangerous tick-borne illnesses like Lyme disease. With treatments ranging from $125 to $325, we provide comprehensive tick management tailored to Englewood's unique landscape.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Englewood and Bergen County for years with proven tick elimination methods that are safe for children and pets. Our licensed technicians understand the specific tick species prevalent in Northern New Jersey and use targeted treatments to create a protective barrier around your property.
localContext: Englewood's beautiful tree-lined streets, proximity to Flat Rock Brook Nature Center, and residential properties with established landscaping create ideal conditions for tick populations to thrive. From the historic homes near downtown to newer developments near Mackay Park, we provide customized tick control solutions that protect Englewood families year-round.

faqs.question: What does tick control service in Englewood include?
faqs.answer: Our tick control service includes a thorough property inspection, targeted application of EPA-approved treatments to tick hotspots, perimeter barrier protection, and follow-up monitoring. We focus on wooded edges, tall grass areas, and shaded zones where ticks commonly live and breed in Englewood properties.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Englewood, NJ?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Englewood typically runs from April through November, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, ticks can be active any time temperatures are above freezing. We recommend starting preventative treatments in early spring and maintaining protection throughout the warm months for optimal results.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Englewood?
faqs.answer: Tick control services in Englewood range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, severity of infestation, and frequency of treatment. Most residential properties require quarterly treatments for season-long protection. We offer free inspections and customized quotes based on your specific needs.

faqs.question: Is tick control treatment safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. Treatments dry quickly, typically within 1-2 hours, after which your family and pets can safely enjoy your yard. We also offer organic tick control options for those seeking natural alternatives.
